title: symphyotrichum × longulum
intro: Symphyotrichum × longulum, a hybrid of the Symphyotrichum subulatum and Symphyotrichum novi-belgii, is a perennial plant belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum × longulum can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant require further research.
